task_completion.description: Create a large rectangular building shell and add the main title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangular shape representing the warehouse walls, with the text 'NorthEast Distribution Center' placed at the top of the diagram.

task_completion.description: Create three loading docks on the top wall and label the receiving zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three shapes representing loading docks placed along the top wall, accompanied by the text labels 'Dock 1', 'Dock 2', 'Dock 3', and 'Zone 1: Receiving' near the docks.

task_completion.description: Create a central storage area with four rows of pallet racks and label the bulk storage zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four parallel rows of rack/pallet shapes in the center of the layout, accompanied by the text labels 'Row A', 'Row B', 'Row C', 'Row D', and 'Zone 2: Bulk Storage'.

task_completion.description: Create a packing area in the bottom-right corner with a conveyor or tables, and label the outbound zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes representing a conveyor belt or packing tables located in the bottom-right corner, accompanied by the text labels 'Packing Station' and 'Zone 3: Outbound'.

task_completion.description: Place at least two forklift vehicles in the aisles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two distinct forklift shapes placed within the aisles between the storage racks or operational zones.

task_completion.description: Save the native EdrawMax file and export it as a PNG image to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: EdrawMax save/export dialogs or a file manager window showing 'warehouse_layout.eddx' and 'warehouse_layout.png' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to construct the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application open with the agent actively dragging shapes from the library, using the canvas, and using the text tool.

integrity.description: The agent used actual diagramming shapes rather than faking the layout with text-only approximations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of graphical icons/shapes for racks, forklifts, conveyors, and docks from the EdrawMax libraries, not just typed words or basic ASCII art.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to create empty or fake files to bypass the export requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows using commands like 'touch /home/ga/Diagrams/warehouse_layout.eddx' or 'touch /home/ga/Diagrams/warehouse_layout.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/Diagrams/warehouse_layout.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/warehouse_layout.png. The diagram must visually contain shapes representing a Rack, Pallet, Conveyor, Forklift, Dock, and Wall. The diagram must include exactly these text labels (or variations containing them): 'NorthEast Distribution Center', 'Dock 1', 'Dock 2', 'Dock 3', 'Row A', 'Row B', 'Row C', 'Row D', 'Zone 1', 'Receiving', 'Zone 2', 'Bulk Storage', 'Zone 3', 'Outbound', 'Packing Station'.
